name: drive-in
description: Canvas media player for Tesla, powered by Mediabunny and WebCodecs
author: 1MoreBuild

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit -w player && npm run test:unit -w server
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration -w player && npm run test:integration -w server
scripts.check:core: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start -w server
scripts.start:tunnel: npm run build && concurrently -k -n server,tunnel -c blue,magenta "npm:start -w server" "cloudflared tunnel run"
